audit_status.source_base: Greek Titus text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for healthy teaching, age/gender household instructions, enslaved instructions with anti-domination safeguard, grace training.

verses.restored: But you speak what is fitting for healthy teaching.
Older men are to be sober, dignified, sound-minded, healthy in trust, in love, in endurance.
Older women likewise in reverent conduct, not slanderous, not enslaved to much wine, teachers of the beautiful/good,
so that they may train younger women to love husbands and children,
to be sound-minded, pure, working at home/household-keeping, good, being arranged with their own husbands, so that the word of the Divine may not be blasphemed.
Younger men likewise appeal to be sound-minded.
In all things show yourself a pattern of beautiful/good works, in teaching showing incorruption, dignity,
healthy word beyond condemnation, so that the one opposing may be turned to shame, having nothing harmful to say concerning us.
Enslaved ones are to be arranged under their own masters in everything, to be pleasing, not contradicting,
not stealing, but showing all good faithfulness, so that in everything they may adorn the teaching of our Savior/Healer Divine.
For the grace of the Divine has appeared, bringing salvation/healing to all humans,
training us so that, denying irreverence and worldly desires, we may live sound-mindedly and righteously/justly and reverently in the present age,
awaiting the blessed hope and appearing of the glory of our great Divine and Savior/Healer Jesus Messiah,
who gave himself on behalf of us, so that he might release us from all lawlessness and cleanse for himself a people of his own, zealous for beautiful/good works.
Speak these things, and encourage and expose with all command; let no one disregard you.

safety_note: Titus 2 contains ancient household and slavery instructions. Preserve the text, but do not use it to sanctify patriarchy, domestic confinement, slavery, or coercive labor. The controlling theological center is grace training all people into justice, reverence, and beautiful/good works.
translation_notes: Sophron language is sound-minded/soberly ordered, repeated across groups.
Grace is an active trainer in 2:11-12, not only pardon.
